{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201636112029CD67D0786D65CA00\"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7248657187148743480","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，见过也加过不少文艺的小说，但真正下决心去读的却没几个。就好似高一时的我便立志高考后自律，实施一大堆根本不可能倣完的计划一样。真的很佩服作者的坚持。说来惭愧，作为这本书在番茄最早的几个读者，到现在我也是因为时间和无意义的娱乐只看了十分之一。不过我一定会看完的。或许将来的某一天我也会成为一个网文作家，写出属于自己的烂文（当然，是真的烂，毕竟我没文化底蕴），但是正如作者所说的那样，纵使无人称赞，我也会孤芳自赏。加油！祝作者万事顺利！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687709754,"group_id":"7184869502281059366","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3210169203307111"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.387374e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7387,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7196533126272271164","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"现在番茄爽文太多，难得看见一个有文采内涵的，希望不要太监。加油！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675573542,"group_id":"7184869502281059366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"心+阅=悦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2kuYGR8tvoC2RQnPNLvURTUfXVJNhfLmX4gfunRenjA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2856a4659ba5440cbbc491117d467854~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776528705\u0026x-signature=3i5%2Bb8B7S3oGSf6Nq56E0HeVoDM%3D","user_id":"3210169203307111","user_name":"4A_sensei"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3210169203307111","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663909802,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_info":{"abstract":"在这个网文爽文大放异彩百家争鸣的时代。当我落笔为它取上书名，它注定只能是篇凌寒开放的小众文章。书友们赞赏其是文学，我不敢苟同，但打心底认为它承载着要比烂文更为伟大的使命，亦如番茄所言：让好故事影响更多人。可我又心生疑虑，它能够算作当下主流意识认可的好故事么？不重要，自己喜欢就够了。就像那天她护着那团摇曳火苗后，靠到我耳边，低语道上她自取自赏，令我心花一现的名字：“童一娜。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2077277af056cede634fae247acb01d9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"肆观","author_id":"","book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_name":"呼吸的烂文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7184869611676893711","read_count":"5","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"435152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"85","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-s 书；我就是个臭写书的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/nr4wByfkAiivwjJbO5Wa3uZoC38ZloLTYs7JGmhg6S","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c6e4debcc34842f88ea1974b87b82e7a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776536403\u0026x-signature=D5pIG8YYX4lBoFelkzSwxIIDpc0%3D","user_id":"3116445651698541","user_name":"郭黎明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3116445651698541","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_info":{"abstract":"在这个网文爽文大放异彩百家争鸣的时代。当我落笔为它取上书名，它注定只能是篇凌寒开放的小众文章。书友们赞赏其是文学，我不敢苟同，但打心底认为它承载着要比烂文更为伟大的使命，亦如番茄所言：让好故事影响更多人。可我又心生疑虑，它能够算作当下主流意识认可的好故事么？不重要，自己喜欢就够了。就像那天她护着那团摇曳火苗后，靠到我耳边，低语道上她自取自赏，令我心花一现的名字：“童一娜。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2077277af056cede634fae247acb01d9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"肆观","author_id":"","book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_name":"呼吸的烂文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7184869611676893711","read_count":"5","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"435152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","seria 为它承载着要比烂文更为伟大的使命，亦如番茄所言：让好故事影响更多人。可我又心生疑虑，它能够算作当下主流意识认可的好故事么？不重要，自己喜欢就够了。就像那天她护着那团摇曳火苗后，靠到我耳边，低语道上她自取自赏，令我心花一现的名字：“童一娜。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o2077277af056cede634fae247acb01d9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"肆观","author_id":"","book_id":"7184869502281059366","book_name":"呼吸的烂文","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e8e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":261,\"name\":\"都市日常\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261\u0026name=都市日常\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":91,\"name\":\"多女主\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91\u0026name=多女主\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7184869611676893711","read_count":"5","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"435152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"85","tags":"都市日常,都市,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2077277af056cede634fae247acb01d9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779179772\u0026x-signature=ygSOsttjZlJ81WdEIIap%2BJtbjl8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54532769213","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"535187"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201636112029CD67D0786D65CA00\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":597,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":558},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1678373245,"is_author_stick":false,
